description_long: This is a British InterCity diesel locomotive, characterized by its streamlined, aerodynamic front nose painted in a distinctive yellow and black livery with orange and white accents. The sides feature the prominent 'INTERCITY' branding and a stylized bird logo, with a long, ribbed black body and several roof-mounted ventilation grilles. The locomotive has a robust undercarriage with visible wheels and suspension components, and the front includes detailed lights, buffers, and coupling mechanisms. The windows are limited to the driver's cab at the front, with no passenger windows visible along the sides, indicating this is a power car rather than a passenger carriage. The rear of the locomotive is flat and functional, with additional coupling and technical details. The overall design is sleek and utilitarian, optimized for high-speed intercity rail service.
description: A streamlined British InterCity diesel locomotive with a yellow nose, black body, and bold 'INTERCITY' branding, featuring detailed technical and aerodynamic elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the yellow aerodynamic nose, cab windows, headlights, and coupling details.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the locomotive, 'INTERCITY' branding, bird logo, and roof grilles.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the flat back, technical components, and absence of a cab window.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with similar features to view 1, showing the length, branding, and technical details.
attribute_window_arrangement: cab windows only, no passenger windows
